name: Las Cruces Baked Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken breasts in half, remove bones and skin.
2. Flatten each breast to about 1/4 inch thickness using a meat mallet.
3. Drain, rinse canned chiles, and remove seeds. Cut chiles and cheese into 8 pieces.
4. Place a piece of chili and a slice of cheese on each chicken breast. Roll up the chicken.
5. In a shallow bowl, combine Parmesan cheese, chili powder, garlic salt, cumin, lemon pepper, and bread crumbs. Mix well.
6. In another shallow bowl, mix melted margarine with water until smooth.
7. Dip each rolled chicken breast first in the margarine mixture, then coat with crumb mixture. Place seam-side down in a 9 x 13-inch baking pan, ensuring breasts do not touch.
8. Refrigerate covered for 30-45 minutes (important step).
9. Preheat oven to 400°F.
10. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes.
Serving Size: 4
Preparation Time: 1 hour
Categories: Poultry Mexican
